key.name: settings-version
key.summary: The version of the settings to update from.

key.name: sigma
key.summary: Global gaussian sigma to use

key.name: brightness
key.summary: Global brightness to use

key.name: vibrancy
key.summary: Global vibrancy to use

key.name: color
key.summary: Color to mix with the blur effect

key.name: noise-amount
key.summary: Amount of noise to add to the blur effect

key.name: noise-lightness
key.summary: Lightness of the noise added to the blur effect

key.name: color-and-noise
key.summary: Boolean, controls wether or not the color and noise effects are in use globally

key.name: hacks-level
key.summary: Level of hacks to use (from 0 to 2, 2 disabling clipped redraws entirely)

key.name: rounded-blur-found
key.summary: Boolean, set to true if a patched version of ShellBlurEffect was found

key.name: debug
key.summary: Boolean, set to true to activate debug mode (more verbose journalctl logs)

key.name: blur
key.summary: Boolean, whether to blur activate the blur for this component or not

key.name: customize
key.summary: Boolean, whether to customize the blur effect sigma/brightness or use general values

key.name: sigma
key.summary: Gaussian sigma to use for the blur effect

key.name: brightness
key.summary: Brightness to use for the blur effect

key.name: vibrancy
key.summary: Vibrancy to use for the blur effect

key.name: color
key.summary: Color to mix with the blur effect

key.name: noise-amount
key.summary: Amount of noise to add to the blur effect

key.name: noise-lightness
key.summary: Lightness of the noise added to the blur effect

key.name: style-components
key.summary: Enum to select the style of the components in overview (0 not styled, 1 light, 2 dark, 3 transparent)

key.name: blur
key.summary: Boolean, whether to blur activate the blur for this component or not

key.name: sigma
key.summary: Gaussian sigma to use for the blur effect

key.name: brightness
key.summary: Brightness to use for the blur effect

key.name: vibrancy
key.summary: Vibrancy to use for the blur effect

key.name: corner-radius
key.summary: Radius for the corner rounding effect

key.name: refraction-strength
key.summary: Strength of the liquid glass refraction effect

key.name: refraction-radius
key.summary: Radius for the liquid glass refraction effect

key.name: refraction-inner-radius
key.summary: Additional inner corner rounding for the liquid glass refraction effect

key.name: date-menu
key.summary: Boolean, whether to blur the date and calendar menu or not

key.name: quick-settings
key.summary: Boolean, whether to blur the quick settings menu or not

key.name: notifications
key.summary: Boolean, whether to blur notification banners and the notification list or not

key.name: osd
key.summary: Boolean, whether to blur OSD overlays or not

key.name: desktop-menus
key.summary: Boolean, whether to blur desktop context menus or not

key.name: app-menus
key.summary: Boolean, whether to blur application and jump-list menus or not

key.name: blur
key.summary: Boolean, whether to blur activate the blur for this component or not

key.name: customize
key.summary: Boolean, whether to customize the blur effect sigma/brightness or use general values

key.name: sigma
key.summary: Gaussian sigma to use for the blur effect

key.name: brightness
key.summary: Brightness to use for the blur effect

key.name: vibrancy
key.summary: Vibrancy to use for the blur effect

key.name: color
key.summary: Color to mix with the blur effect

key.name: noise-amount
key.summary: Amount of noise to add to the blur effect

key.name: noise-lightness
key.summary: Lightness of the noise added to the blur effect

key.name: style-dialogs
key.summary: Enum to select the style of the appfolder dialogs (0 not styled, 1 transparent, 2 light, 3 dark)

key.name: blur
key.summary: Boolean, whether to blur activate the blur for this component or not

key.name: customize
key.summary: Boolean, whether to customize the blur effect sigma/brightness or use general values

key.name: sigma
key.summary: Gaussian sigma to use for the blur effect

key.name: brightness
key.summary: Brightness to use for the blur effect

key.name: vibrancy
key.summary: Vibrancy to use for the blur effect

key.name: corner-radius
key.summary: Radius for the corner rounding effect

key.name: color
key.summary: Color to mix with the blur effect

key.name: noise-amount
key.summary: Amount of noise to add to the blur effect

key.name: noise-lightness
key.summary: Lightness of the noise added to the blur effect

key.name: unblur-in-overview
key.summary: Boolean, whether to disable blur from this component when opening the overview or not

key.name: force-light-text
key.summary: Boolean, whether or not to force the panel to have light text, useful when using light theme

key.name: override-background
key.summary: Boolean, whether to override the background or not

key.name: style-panel
key.summary: Enum to select the style of the panel (0 transparent, 1 light, 2 dark, 3 contrasted)

key.name: override-background-dynamically
key.summary: Boolean, whether to disable blur from this component when a window is close to the panel

key.name: blur
key.summary: Boolean, whether to blur activate the blur for Dhruva dock or not

key.name: customize
key.summary: Boolean, whether to customize the blur effect sigma/brightness or use general values

key.name: sigma
key.summary: Gaussian sigma to use for Dhruva dock blur

key.name: brightness
key.summary: Brightness to use for Dhruva dock blur

key.name: vibrancy
key.summary: Vibrancy to use for Dhruva dock blur

key.name: corner-radius
key.summary: Radius for the corner rounding effect

key.name: refraction-strength
key.summary: Strength of the liquid glass refraction effect

key.name: refraction-radius
key.summary: Radius for the liquid glass refraction effect

key.name: refraction-inner-radius
key.summary: Additional inner corner rounding for the liquid glass refraction effect

key.name: blur
key.summary: Boolean, whether to blur activate the blur for this component or not

key.name: customize
key.summary: Boolean, whether to customize the blur effect sigma/brightness or use general values

key.name: sigma
key.summary: Gaussian sigma to use for the blur effect

key.name: brightness
key.summary: Brightness to use for the blur effect

key.name: vibrancy
key.summary: Vibrancy to use for the blur effect

key.name: refraction-strength
key.summary: Strength of the liquid glass refraction effect

key.name: refraction-radius
key.summary: Radius for the liquid glass refraction effect

key.name: refraction-inner-radius
key.summary: Additional inner corner rounding for the liquid glass refraction effect

key.name: corner-radius
key.summary: Radius for the corner rounding effect

key.name: corner-when-maximized
key.summary: Boolean, whether to keep rounding the corners of fullscreen and maximized window or not

key.name: color
key.summary: Color to mix with the blur effect

key.name: noise-amount
key.summary: Amount of noise to add to the blur effect

key.name: noise-lightness
key.summary: Lightness of the noise added to the blur effect

key.name: opacity
key.summary: Opacity of the window actor on top of the blur effect

key.name: dynamic-opacity
key.summary: Wether or not to make the focused window opaque

key.name: blur-on-overview
key.summary: Wether or not to blur applications on the overview

key.name: enable-all
key.summary: Wether or not to blur all applications by default

key.name: whitelist
key.summary: List of applications to blur

key.name: blacklist
key.summary: List of applications not to blur

key.name: blur
key.summary: Boolean, whether to blur activate the blur for this component or not

key.name: customize
key.summary: Boolean, whether to customize the blur effect sigma/brightness or use general values

key.name: sigma
key.summary: Gaussian sigma to use for the blur effect

key.name: brightness
key.summary: Brightness to use for the blur effect

key.name: vibrancy
key.summary: Vibrancy to use for the blur effect

key.name: color
key.summary: Color to mix with the blur effect

key.name: noise-amount
key.summary: Amount of noise to add to the blur effect

key.name: noise-lightness
key.summary: Lightness of the noise added to the blur effect

key.name: compatibility
key.summary: Boolean, whether to try compatibility with hidetopbar@mathieu.bidon.ca or not

key.name: blur-original-panel
key.summary: Boolean, whether to blur the original panel (if option selected) with Dash to Panel
